enrichment.summary: Kyle checks in from Boulder at the end of a long day, documenting his daily routine of window-washing work and helping his mom, then diving into his current project of mapping every Colorado ski resort in Google Earth. He discusses the history and personalities of various Colorado ski resorts — Crested Butte, Steamboat, Berthoud Pass, Keystone — and explains his plan to eventually link each ski run to a video.
enrichment.speaker: kyle
topics: Google Earth ski resort mapping project

stances.position: It's the only practical time to do it and doesn't impair his ability to talk
Initially worried it would disrupt his time-warp focus but now thinks it's fine
Finds them beautiful and historically interesting; each has a distinct personality
